entry.title: Bill 90 (Hawaiʻi County): GOEAC: Bill 90 withdrawn by introducer - 10/21/25
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLE XIII, SECTION 13-8, OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO TERMS OF OFFICE AND APPOINTMENT OF DEPARTMENT HEADS

Repeals the requirement that the Mayor appoint department heads within 30 days of taking office, and within 60 days of any vacancy occurring during the Mayor’s term of office.

Latest action: GOEAC: Bill 90 withdrawn by introducer - 10/21/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 90 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-10-21
entry.content:
INITIATES AN AMENDMENT TO ARTICLE XIII, SECTION 13-8, OF THE CHARTER OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAI‘I (2024 EDITION), RELATING TO TERMS OF OFFICE AND APPOINTMENT OF DEPARTMENT HEADS

Repeals the requirement that the Mayor appoint department heads within 30 days of taking office, and within 60 days of any vacancy occurring during the Mayor’s term of office.

Latest action: On agenda 2025-10-21

View on the council site
